hero.title: Learn Solana and Earn On-Chain Rewards
hero.subtitle: Superteam's decentralized learning platform. Complete lessons, earn soulbound XP, and build your on-chain reputation.

featuredCourses.title: Featured Courses
featuredCourses.subtitle: Hand-picked courses to kickstart your Solana journey

onChain.title: On-Chain Verified
onChain.description: All progress is recorded on Solana. Your XP and credentials are soulbound — no one can take them away.

soulboundXP.title: Soulbound XP
soulboundXP.description: Earn non-transferable Token-2022 XP tokens for every completed lesson. Your score is yours forever.

nftCredentials.title: NFT Credentials
nftCredentials.description: Receive Metaplex Core credential NFTs upon completing a course, visible in any Solana wallet.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built on open-source Solana programs. Fully verifiable, transparent, and community-driven.

step1.title: Join for Free
step1.description: Sign up with Google or GitHub in seconds — no wallet required to start.

step2.title: Browse Courses
step2.description: Explore Solana courses from beginner to advanced and find the right path for your goals.

step3.title: Complete Lessons
step3.description: Learn at your own pace, complete code challenges, and earn XP tokens for every finished lesson.

step4.title: Earn Credentials
step4.description: Get on-chain NFT certificates that prove your achievement and live in your Solana wallet.

testimonials.title: What students say
testimonials.subtitle: Builders from around the world trust Superteam Academy to level up their Solana skills

items.name: Alex Rivera
items.text: The interactive code challenges are what set Superteam Academy apart. I went from zero Rust knowledge to deploying my first Anchor program in three weeks — the hands-on approach makes everything click.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.text: The on-chain credential system is a game changer. My Metaplex Core NFT certificates are visible in my wallet and verifiable by any employer. It's real proof of work, not just a PDF.

items.name: Marcus Johnson
items.text: The XP leaderboard and achievement badges made learning addictive. I never thought I'd finish three courses in a month, but the gamification kept me coming back every single day.

learningPaths.title: Learning Paths
learningPaths.subtitle: Structured tracks to guide your Solana journey from zero to builder

solanaFundamentals.title: Solana Fundamentals
solanaFundamentals.description: Master the core concepts of Solana: accounts, transactions, programs, and the runtime. Perfect starting point for any Solana developer.

defiDevelopment.title: DeFi Development
defiDevelopment.description: Build decentralized finance applications on Solana. Learn AMMs, lending protocols, liquidity pools, and token economics.

nftGaming.title: NFT & Gaming
nftGaming.description: Create NFT collections, gaming assets, and on-chain game mechanics using Metaplex Core and Token-2022.

advancedProtocol.title: Advanced Protocol Development
advancedProtocol.description: Deep dive into complex Solana programs: CPI, PDAs, cross-program composition, and performance optimization.

anchorDevelopment.title: Anchor Development
anchorDevelopment.description: Build robust Solana programs with the Anchor framework. Learn IDL generation, account validation, and program testing.

web3Frontend.title: Web3 Frontend
web3Frontend.description: Build modern dApps with React and Next.js. Learn wallet adapters, transaction signing, and real-time on-chain data.

step2.title: Learn by Doing
